pr.title: Add 11L RotaryFix + LegalTTT + BIGRAM3072 — val_bpb 1.11869 (3-seed m…

output.summary: Rotary NTK scaling now respects 2048 seq len in both models, paired with BIGRAM3072, prolonged late-QAT, and Legal TTT scoring/retrain protocol.
techniques: Propagated train_seq_len=2048 into Rotary for base and eval models to avoid NTK scaling mismatch
Scaled BIGRAM hash to 3072 and raised the late-QAT threshold to extend quantization-aware steps
Legal TTT workflow: torch.no_grad scoring followed by three epochs of SGD per chunk before final evaluation
